START

Rapid Fire Questions
Great, till later

You can expect an email from me soon.
/public/silos.png
/public/silos2.png
Let's go

Dear {{ firstName }},

When team members are working in silos, they cannot collaborate effectively, which can lead to missed deadlines, subpar work, poor communication and general feelings of frustration.

 

I think we can all agree that’s something we don’t want to see around here 😁

 

That’s why we will encourage collaboration and networking across the organization. 

 

You can start by clicking the button below.
Welcome onboard!

items.name: Message about not working hours for links

elements.content: Sorry, time has passed. Better luck next time ;)

Couldn’t match you this week!

Unfortunately I couldn’t match your availability this week with any of your colleagues. 
Please try to make yourself available around noon every day next time if possible, that will increase your chances of meeting one of your colleagues for lunch.
You can do that right now if you want.

Best,

Ava
Lunch info

You haven't picked your preffered days, please hurry up because I will start matching people for lunch.

elements.content: You’re welcome. Stay tuned for the lunch 🙂
